use_cases: Generative ambient animation for creative portfolios
Cinematic UI background with orbital star mechanics
ai_summary: A canvas-based starfield animation component that renders thousands of stars with orbital mechanics, wave effects, and rotation. Stars are positioned in circular orbits around a central point with customizable colors, opacity, and movement patterns. The component uses low-level pixel manipulation for performance and includes configurable wave frequencies and escape widths for dynamic visual effects.
